_comment: Plan for build_reel.py. Paths resolve relative to THIS file unless absolute.
_broll_modes: broll_source can be (a) a TALL ARTICLE SCREENSHOT (.png) — recommended for article reels: build_reel pans it with a controllable, explicit scroll speed via per-beat scroll_from/scroll_to (pixels in the article once scaled to canvas width); a beat with scroll_from:0 frames the HEADLINE. Or (b) a screen RECORDING (.mp4) — legacy: each beat holds a static crop CW:CH:CX:CY at broll_in (aspect-preserved, no squash).
_language: language: 'English' keeps the HeyGen text VO (unchanged). Any other value makes gen_avatar.py use a dynamically-picked ElevenLabs voice for that language; captions auto-follow (Whisper). platform: 'youtube' -> brand-callout CTA (no comment/link); 'instagram' -> comment-DM CTA.

caption._cta: EN/Instagram: cta_word='comment' + cta_text='Comment "SEO"'. Non-English or YouTube brand callout: set cta_word=null, cta_anchor='tail', cta_text='Zoek <Brand>' and the pill holds over the last cta_tail_s seconds.
